bank.retain_mission: Extract API test coverage, evidence captured during runs, and test-result analysis across the automation stack.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the test stack, environments, evidence capture, and recurring failure modes. Ignore one-off flake debugging.

mental_models.name: Automation Stack
mental_models.source_query: What tools, layers, and environments make up our automation? Include coverage targets.

mental_models.name: Failure Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What failure modes recur in API tests and result analysis? Include root causes.
